messages: I want to plan a long weekend in Barcelona, Spain. Flying from LAX, early October 2026. Couple's trip.
My friend sent me this restaurant link, can you check it out and tell me if it's worth adding? https://www.tripadvisor.com/Restaurant_Review-g187497-d1060778-Reviews-Cal_Pep-Barcelona_Catalonia.html
Nice, let's lock in flights and a boutique hotel in the Gothic Quarter. Budget around $250/night.
